name: io.github.andresdefi/zerodust
description: Sweep native gas tokens to exactly zero across 25+ EVM chains via AI agents.

environmentVariables.description: API key for higher rate limits
environmentVariables.name: ZERODUST_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Set to "true" to enable the sweep tools. Sweeping moves real funds, so it is off by default and also requires ZERODUST_PRIVATE_KEY.
environmentVariables.name: ZERODUST_ALLOW_EXECUTE

environmentVariables.description: Private key for the agent's own wallet, used locally to sign the EIP-7702 authorization and EIP-712 sweep intent. Never transmitted; only the resulting signatures are sent.
environmentVariables.name: ZERODUST_PRIVATE_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated allowlist of sweep destinations. When unset, funds can only be swept to the agent's own address.
environmentVariables.name: ZERODUST_ALLOWED_DESTINATIONS
